query: SELECT t.id, t.name, tp.id as phase_id, tp.key, tp.label, tp.order, tp.slots, tp.is_knockout FROM tournaments t LEFT JOIN tournament_phases tp ON tp.tournament_id = t.id WHERE t.name LIKE '%Copa%' OR t.name LIKE '%World%' ORDER BY t.id, tp.order;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute SELECT t.id, t.name, tp.id as phase_id, tp.key, tp.label, tp.order, tp.slots, tp.is_knockout FROM tournaments t LEFT JOIN tournament_phases tp ON tp.tournament_id = t.id WHERE t.name LIKE '%Copa%' OR t.name LIKE '%World%' ORDER BY t.id, tp.order;
